title: Can we make private a form?
excerpt: Hi :slight_smile: Does anyone know if it is possible to make the forms private so that only a few people can complete them? Thanks

posts.author: Jimenar99 (Jimena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Does anyone know if it is possible to make the forms private so that only a few people can complete them? Thanks

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Sorry for the late response!

Only the people who have the form link will be able to fill out the form. However, you can also deactivate the form link if you think it is being abused or shared beyond who you want to use it.

If you’d like to figure out a different workaround that allows for some more privacy, let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
